plan.sketch: Correct drifted figures: test count 313->427; '8 closed + 1 in progress' -> 22 closed + current active across README.md:54-55,158, docs/vision.md, docs/constraints.md, docs/questions.md; reconcile adopter wording against ADOPTERS.json; flip the live-install caveat [U]->[E] citing 0011 retro P5.4; update the stale 'It is v0.1.0' string to 0.2.0.

Correct docs/scope.md:64 (G15): the 'Reconciliation' section denies decomposition/nesting was built, but lume spawn ships (handlers/lifecycle.py handle_spawn, workstream parent field, 0011 P19-P22 accepted). Reframe as a logged revision acknowledging the build, not a denial.

Wire a deterministic, offline CI freshness guard (extend the version-consistency test pattern) that re-derives test/closed-workstream/active/adopter counts from source and fails when README/docs prose disagrees.
Add a short docs note that [E]-tagged count/version claims are CI-enforced, so future edits know the figures are machine-checked.

workstream.title: Re-anchor drifted README/docs claims and wire a CI freshness guard
